notableEvents.label: Wilyer Abreu GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nationals challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Wilyer Abreu grounds into a double play, first baseman Andrés Chaparro to shortstop Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Andrés Chaparro. Anthony Seigler out at 2nd. Wilyer Abreu out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. singles on a line drive to left fielder Nate Eaton. Drew Millas scores. James Wood scores. Curtis Mead to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Daylen Lile GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Daylen Lile grounds into a double play, second baseman Anthony Seigler to shortstop Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras. Curtis Mead scores. Luis García Jr. to 3rd. Dylan Crews out at 2nd. Daylen Lile out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Daylen Lile rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Daylen Lile grounds into a double play, second baseman Anthony Seigler to shortstop Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras. Curtis Mead scores. Luis García Jr. to 3rd. Dylan Crews out at 2nd. Daylen Lile out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: James Wood GIDP
notableEvents.detail: James Wood grounds into a double play, second baseman Anthony Seigler to shortstop Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras. Drew Millas out at 2nd. James Wood out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. grounds out, first baseman Willson Contreras to pitcher Jovani Morán.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. grounds out, shortstop Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras.

notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. grounds out, second baseman Anthony Seigler to first baseman Willson Contreras.
